title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 261.239 - Division to create website to foster marketing of Missouri agricultural products
text:
261.239.  Division to create website to foster marketing of Missouri agricultural products. — The agriculture business development division of the department of agriculture shall create an internet website for the purpose of fostering the marketing of Missouri agricultural products over the internet.
(L. 2000 S.B. 894 § 261.038, A.L. 2002 H.B. 1348, A.L. 2008 S.B. 931)
